ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "employee_email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "employee_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "employee_department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "employee_position" TEXT /* Position or role of the employee */,
  "employee_hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "employee_termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "product_price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "product_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "product_supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "continents" (
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each continent */,
  "continent_name" TEXT /* Name of the continent */,
  "continent_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each continent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each country */,
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the continent the country belongs to */,
  "country_population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "country_area" TEXT /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_continent_id FOREIGN KEY ("continent_id") REFERENCES continents ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who made the sale */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter in which the sale was made */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the continent where the sale was made */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the sale was made */,
  "sale_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Exact date of the sale */,
  "sale_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the sale was made */,
  "sale_discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "sale_tax" TEXT /* Tax applied to the sale */,
  "sale_net_amount" TEXT /* Net amount of the sale after discounts and taxes */,
  "sale_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the sale was made */,
  "sale_customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_sale_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_continent_id FOREIGN KEY ("continent_id") REFERENCES continents ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "supplier_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "supplier_contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "supplier_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "supplier_address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "supplier_country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the supplier is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "customer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "customer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "customer_address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "customer_country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the customer is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)
